title: scilla obtusifolia var. intermedia
intro: Scilla obtusifolia var. intermedia, also known as the intermediate squill or lesser blue squill, is a bulbous perennial plant that belongs to the Asparagaceae family. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various health issues such as coughs, colds, and respiratory problems, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Scilla obtusifolia var. intermedia include its ability to relieve congestion, reduce fever, and soothe sore throats. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in the form of infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat respiratory issues and other health conditions.
